https://t.co/c90fUkOkua
https://t.co/2eWrrEN7N0

on motorcycles the difference between slamming on the front brake and slowly squeezing it is life and death, and in pottery that same thing determines if your piece falls apart, the medium makes you slow down and be very conscious about your actions
there's this whole idea of smooth operations, rolling on and off the throttle, releasing the clay slowly, and if you fuck it up you can feel how bad it is

motorcycle riding and pottery are very similar- there is an indescribable foundational principal that is to let your body be both loose and in control, if you tighten up or try to control things too much, things go south in a very real and physical way, no idea what it's called
